steps.title: To the antigen source (clarified cellular...
steps.instruction: To the antigen source (clarified cellular lysates, purified virions, or recombinant purified protein), add 1:1 4X Laemmli sample buffer with 10% BME for final concentration of 2X sample buffer and 5% BME.

steps.title: Heat at 100°C for 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Heat at 100°C for 10 minutes.

steps.title: Quickspin to collect sample droplets from top of snapcap tube
steps.instruction: Quickspin to collect sample droplets from top of snapcap tube.

steps.title: Load 250 µL of prepared lysate...
steps.instruction: Load 250 µL of prepared lysate to the large well of a 2D gel. Load 5 µL of SeeBlue2 ladder (or pre-stained ladder of choice) to the small well.

steps.title: Perform electrophoreses at 100 V for approximately 1 hour
steps.instruction: Perform electrophoreses at 100 V for approximately 1 hour.

steps.title: Transfer gel to membrane using the iBlot system
steps.instruction: Transfer gel to membrane using the iBlot system.

steps.title: Using a ruler, draw a line...
steps.instruction: Using a ruler, draw a line with a pen approximately 0.5 cm from the top edge of the blot.

steps.title: Using the ruler and a razor blade, cut strips
steps.instruction: Using the ruler and a razor blade, cut strips. Strips should be approximately 2 mm in width, starting from the far edge of the blot. This works best using a pane of glass as a cutting surface. Discard the first 5 mm of the far edge.

steps.title: Store strips in blocking buffer at 4°C until use
steps.instruction: Store strips in blocking buffer at 4°C until use.

steps.title: Allocate the pre-blocked strips to a western incubation dish
steps.instruction: Allocate the pre-blocked strips to a western incubation dish.

steps.title: Cover with 500 uL blocking buffer
steps.instruction: Cover with 500 uL blocking buffer.

steps.title: Add desired volume of sera or blood sample to well
steps.instruction: Add desired volume of sera or blood sample to well. Recommend to use a volume of 2 uL to 10 uL.

steps.title: Incubate overnight with rocking at 4°C
steps.instruction: Incubate overnight with rocking at 4°C.

steps.title: Following day, carefully decant sample
steps.instruction: Following day, carefully decant sample.

steps.title: Rinse 3X with TBS-T, followed by...
steps.instruction: Rinse 3X with TBS-T, followed by 3 5-minute rinses with TBS-T.

steps.title: Add 500 uL of 2° antibody...
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL of 2° antibody to each lane and incubate at room temperature in the dark with rocking for at least 1 hour.

steps.title: Rinse 3X with TBS-T, followed by...
steps.instruction: Rinse 3X with TBS-T, followed by 3 5-minute rinses with TBS-T.

steps.title: Remove remaining washing buffer with a pipette
steps.instruction: Remove remaining washing buffer with a pipette.

steps.title: Add 500 uL developing agent to...
steps.instruction: Add 500 uL developing agent to blot and incubate in the dark for 30 minutes or until color develops.

steps.title: Remove strips from incubation dish and...
steps.instruction: Remove strips from incubation dish and mount on paper to scan. Store in dark.
